name: Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken breast into long, 1/2-inch wide strips.
2. To make a marinade, finely chop the garlic cloves and jalapeno peppers in a food processor with the chopping blade running until smooth (about 10 seconds).
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the food processor and process until smooth (another 10 seconds).
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken and let marinate for at least 2 hours at room temperature or overnight in the refrigerator, turning occasionally.
5. Preheat the oven broiler.
6. Drain the chicken, reserving the marinade. Arrange the chicken on a rack over a broiler tray and broil 3 inches from the heat source for 5 minutes. Turn the chicken, baste with marinade, and continue broiling for another five minutes.
7. Serve with warmed tortillas, shredded lettuce, shredded cheese, chopped tomatoes, and salsa verde.
